claimBoundary: This diagnostic can distinguish population-history sensitivity from near-wall link-composition sensitivity among the majority-coverage high-influence reflected links. It cannot establish whole-boundary causality, grid convergence, experimental agreement, quantitative bird-load acceptance, production promotion, or free flight, and it does not authorize a collision or boundary modification.
nextAction: Run one minimal canonical that isolates the identified mechanism before changing production physics.
scientificVerdict: The frozen ledger identifies near-wall link composition as a temporally stable >=50% self contribution.
